title: Dynamite
why_this_song: Dynamite by Taio Cruz (2010) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "'Cause we gon' rock this club, we gon' go all night"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I hit the floor 'cause that's my plans, plans, plans, plans (yeah)"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Give me some space for both my hands, hands, hands, hands"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Saying, "Ayo, gotta let go""
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "We gon' light it up like it's dynamite"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gon'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gon'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "cause" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I came to dance, dance, dance, dance (yeah)

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Taio Cruz one question about "Dynamite", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Taio Cruz sobre "Dynamite", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Dynamite" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Dynamite" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Dynamite" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Dynamite" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
